g.text: Make the widget feel like a native part of your store. Changes apply instantly.
Pick a primary. We'll build the gradient and hover states for you.
PNG or SVG, up to 2 MB. Displayed in the header and agent bubbles.
Hi! I'm looking for a linen dress
Shown after 6 seconds on cart and product pages.
Hi! I'm Aria — I can help with sizing, shipping to
Sweden, or finding the perfect piece for an event. What are you shopping for?
